title: ブライト・イン・ワンダーワールド

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, Trainer, but there are still some
places I wish to visit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There's something I'm looking for. Would you be
willing to help me find it?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be looking for something that's
important to her. Hoping to lend her any
assistance she might need, I follow Mejiro Bright
to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! That fish is so very pretty. I wonder what it's
called?
choice_data_list: (...An aquarium?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, its tail fin looks rather like a little ruffle...
Teehee. I wonder what it's like to have a frilly fin
like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And those two puffer fish are adorable. When
they puff up together, they resemble a pair of
Renaissance-era breeches. ♪ Come, Trainer, this
way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ruffles and Renaissance-era breeches? Is she
searching for fashion inspiration? ...I think I'd
better keep an eye on her for a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... This is quite bitter. Milk and sugar
really are a must...
choice_data_list: How come you ordered a black coffee?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I thought that perhaps it might taste sweet today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...But coffee remains a bitter beverage. I can still
taste it on my tongue!

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sweet and delicious! And the latte art is so
cute! Could this coffee be any better?!
choice_data_list: Bright, I have a suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... What an adorable drawing of a bear! And this tastes ever so sweet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. ♪ Trainer. You have the makings of a
latte mustache.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... It's so peaceful here.

text_block_list.name: Cow
text_block_list.text: Moooo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you taking it easy as well, Mrs. Cow?
That makes two of us...

text_block_list.name: Cow
text_block_list.text: Moooo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Moo moooo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! What's that? I should take the time to smell
the flowers? Well, you're a kind one, Miss Cow.
choice_data_list: They're communicating?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you try, too, Trainer? I do believe we
could all be friends.
choice_data_list: M-mooo?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we return to the academy with me
none the wiser as to what Mejiro Bright was
looking for. Did the search slip her mind entirely?
choice_data_list: Bright, weren't you looking for something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was! ♪ And thanks to your assistance, I found it.
Thank you so much.
choice_data_list: You did? When?
You did? When?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I found all sorts of them with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My treasures... ♪
choice_data_list: "Treasures"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The things I treasure most in this world—Maki,
Lolita fashion, antiques, memories made
day-to-day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'd been keeping them all in the treasure chest in
my heart, for my own viewing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After spending time with you, however, I came to
realize something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The treasures in that chest seem to shine brighter
when I gaze at them with you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And... I began to wonder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What would happen if there were more treasures?
What if we gazed at that treasure chest even
longer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And I thought it would probably be very
wonderful.
choice_data_list: I hope I was a good assistant today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My! What a peculiar thing to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
On my own, I'd never have discovered the
treasure that was today. ♪
choice_data_list:
What sort of treasure should we look for next
time?

Let's keep searching every nook and cranny for
more!
Treasures of the heart really are wonderful.
Treasures of the heart really are wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
On my own, I'd never have discovered the
treasure that was today. ♪
choice_data_list:
What sort of treasure should we look for next
time?

Let's keep searching every nook and cranny for
more!
Treasures of the heart really are wonderful.
Treasures of the heart really are wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, there are simply so many options.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, the day after that, next week, next
year... Time is most definitely on our side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, how about this? Trainer, why don't you tell me about your treasures?
choice_data_list: Sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! I can hardly wait to see how they'll
shine. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh yes, and find treasure we shall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But straining ourselves in the process won't do.
Let's have a nice, leisurely search.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: For ordinary occasions and ordinary places.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Because those are treasures as well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe, and there are so many more out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That pretty shell I found lying on the beach, the
wristband Ryan gave to me, the picture book I
drew with Dober when we were little...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? Where has the time gone?
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see what we find tomorrow.
I can't wait to see what we find tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Tomorrow and the next day, too. How
wonderful it is to have so many things to look
forward to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well then, until our next opportunity. This is so
exciting! ♪
